name: xbox-godot-sample
description: GDExtension addons for the Microsoft public GDK and PlayFab. Build-time dependencies for godot_gdk, godot_playfab, and godot_gameinput.

godot-gdk.description: Dependencies for godot_gdk and godot_playfab addons (Microsoft GDK + PlayFab).

godot-gameinput.description: Dependencies for godot_gameinput addon (Microsoft GameInput v3).
